title: PopulationClass
description: A population class definition with consumption demands and labor contribution.

consumption_per_head_per_tick.description: Good IDs → units consumed per head per simulation tick.

labor_days_per_head_per_tick.description: Worker-days of labor contributed per head per tick.

coin_income_per_head_per_tick.description: Coin generated per head per tick from wages, rents, and market activity. Coin circulates; it is not consumed like a commodity.

luxury_demand_fraction.description: Fraction of this class's income spent on luxury goods. Drives unrest if unmet.

unrest_per_food_shortage.description: Unrest added per unit of food shortfall per head.

min_tier.description: Minimum settlement tier for this class to exist. 0=all sizes.
